binman v0.1.2
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • binman: Basics
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

binman 0.1.2 2020-10-02

  • Fixed a bug in an assertion function (thanks @vjcitn #6)
  • Addressed CRAN warnings and notes

binman 0.1.1 2018-07-18

  • Fixed tests for CRAN re-submission.

binman 0.1.0 2017-01-14

  • Add verbose argument to process_yaml.
  • Moved semantic versioning to separate package

binman 0.0.8 Unreleased

  • Add semantic version parsing.

binman 0.0.6 Unreleased

  • Added a vignette on basic functionality of binman.

binman 0.0.5 Unreleased

  • “binman_” is now prepended to the root directory of an app to prevent possible name clashes.
  • Add bzip2 file format to unziptar_dlfiles

binman 0.0.4 Unreleased

  • Added list_versions function, docs and test to list application version by platform.
  • Added rm_version function, docs and test to remove application versions by platform.
  • Added rm_platform function, docs and test to remove application by platform.
  • Added app_dir function, docs and test to return an applications root directory.

binman 0.0.3 Unreleased

  • Added Apveyor CI for windows
  • Update post download zip function to handle tar and chmod

binman 0.0.2 Unreleased

  • Added github assets pre download template.
  • Added bitbucket downloads pre download template.

binman 0.0.1 Unreleased

  • Added download_files, assign_directory functions.
  • Added google storage pre download template.

binman 0.0.0.9000 Unreleased

  • Added a NEWS.md file to track changes to the package.
